reviews.review_description:
Its fantastic, brilliant and so playable! 
I never had more fun for not even 1 euro. 
Its worth much more and it keeps coming back for more. VR at its best! Thanks

What else can I say about this other than wow. The team that worked on this did a phenomenal job. Relaxing, and the best graphics I have seen on Gear VR yet, I can only imagine what the developers could do with the rift or vice. I found myself missing mail pieces because I was just looking around. I will be tapping my foot waiting for a full paid release... I would drop 40 on it in a heart beat. If it does go up for a larger release I would only hope they enable an optional free flight mode on the levels you have completed. I feel as though I missed so much of what I can only say is Gear VR perfection. Bravo.... bravo.
I want to keep going past level 2 bug it keeps bringing me back to the beginning.  Help please! Very anxious to get past level 2 of tjis beautiful scenery.
Sets a tone to cheer you up and relax you at the same time. Made my day when I found this. We need more games like this one.
Amazing game please add more levels. i will like to see more from this developer.
Please release the PC version with improved graphics and a possible new stories. I am happy to buy such a game.

I love this app. I use it when I need a moment to centre myself. The music is very soothing by following it through the gentle head movements required for this game, although I’m not sure game is the right word for this, experience is probably more accurate. It’s a gentle visually stunning experience that I have frequently returned to.
Decent game could have more gameplay elements, but overall great graphics, design and music
A creative and immersive game for VR. Wonderful soundtracks and imaginative. Will replay, and would love to see similar things in the future!
Great idea, performances are not stabilized and the art style is average but huge potential
Unable to install s7 edge boo
I give this 5 stars. Good play no lag was fun. Sound is great.  Not my type of game and yet I liked this a lot

You can clearly see the developers of this game have put a lot of time and effort into making 
It's a fun vr game love the music and all the background animals ect that look realistic 
It just works in vr
Beautifully made,  wonderful music and great exercise for the neck
One of my favorite VR games currently available.  Amazing for free, I'd totally buy this for a couple bucks.

Easily the prettiest game in the Gear VR catalog.  Not actually a flying game, it's effectively a rail shooter, with lovely scenery, flying whales, and panty shots to distract you.  There's also some elements of a rhythm game.

You do have to repeat each level too many times for my taste, though.
Beautiful and pleasing. I love this experience.

This game is so beautiful. Its a nice way to relax and enjoy the atmosphere. I am unsure why there are Christmas trees in it though. That is a bit strange and out of place. Also, in the house on the menu where it is supposed to say “Start Game” it says “Star Game”.
Edit: Looking at the game version notes I see the last  update was a Christmas update in 2016! How can you just abandon a game like that and still charge people?
Great relaxing game. My only complaint is that I wish there were more levels! Keep up the good work guys!! :D
I find myself playing it without actually playing to win -It’s that enjoyable, beautiful, and relaxing.  Please make a better one with better graphics for the Quest.
